name: Akai Onna
short_description: Akai Onna | 赤い女 is a psychological J-horror game featuring a student.
detailed_description:
Akai Onna | 赤い女 is a psychological J-horror game featuring a student.

Story

A student is on his way home late at night when he encounters a woman in red.
Since that day he has felt someone's eyes on him.

Game Features

・Mainly a first person walking simulator.
・Stories inspired by Japanese urban legends
・VHS effects (can be turned off in settings)
・Two endings

About the distribution of the game

Welcome. No prior notice is required.
If you would like, we would appreciate it if you could include this store page URL in the summary section of the distribution page, etc.
